locate the information you need, please contact ResDAC.
| SAS Name | Variable Name | 
|---|---|
| FORMULARY_ID | Formulary Identification Number | 
| FRMLRY_RX_ID | CCW Formulary Drug Identifier | 
| TIER_ID | Tier Number | 
| STEP | Step Number | 
| QUANTITY_LIMIT_YN | Quantity Limit Indicator (Formulary) | 
| PRIOR_AUTHORIZATION_YN | Prior Authorization Indicator (Formulary) | 
| BN | Brand Name | 
| GNN | Generic Name | 
| STR | Drug Strength Description | 
| GCDF | Dosage Form Code |
